name: Jim Jordan
subject: Petition: 100,000 signatures to help flip the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We're looking for 100,000 conservatives to join our efforts in support of flipping the House before Biden's first State of the Union on February 23rd.

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r)
---
**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:****[We have 13 days until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 28,000 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,538 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by February 23 rd**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r)
Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order.

In the first week of his presidency Joe Biden signed more than 40 executive orders. For a guy who campaigned on bipartisan compromise, **he's off to a very lousy start**. So much for working with Republicans - or even his own party - in Congress!

**This is just the beginning:** in the coming weeks expect more executive orders, government madidates, economy crushing shutdowns, government spending increases and more.

I'm writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in Congress to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Democrat administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year - **it's imperative we're able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

Before the State of the Union speech on February 23rd, **I've set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have 13 days until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 28,000 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,538 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal. **

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We're counting on you to join our cause.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can't block Democrats' pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November's election - they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57425561:skGBQNdtN:m:1:2247059263:76C9B9C56BEEA68816111D9CF26D73E9:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 25, 2020.

name: Liz Cheney
subject: We have to get to work Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming
body:
Over the past few weeks, we have seen the Biden Administration pass a number of executive orders

Friend, Liz Cheney here.
Over the past few weeks, we have seen the Biden Administration pass a number of executive orders. Despite claiming that he wanted to bring this country together, he seems content to implement his dangerous policy agenda with the stroke of a pen.

Already, the policies of President Biden have eliminated critical energy jobs and paved the way for open borders. Sadly, this is just the beginning.

**President Biden and the Democrats cannot go unchecked.** We need to finish what we started in 2020, and take back the House in 2022. [**Can I count on your support?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ypx9F-gq5DJCE4aGuQr6Z8BzYWEqq9XeQv07fCQhYWrABcI_kYrLlbB72npv8xY_CCA8D5W29-XvHr2UzQeUoG0NyhJz_uoLUhir0dWdoKlZVhQ8lkc0_K5yR_rRCWh8f4RMfooc0TqG--YFIV_Unr4_ihn-4nF08rlqgOxwMX8tVOgWaaBet73QNFUGqFBBzwXGapiE9LCSJoLdOu272i4VcG51GnCbWHDMD447YG-m9SfMhE5jaSYq82kRLyg0ZYUt627C-CGpObZkVozP6M38osiI4HWZenKawS8aXFzzQ8VC4ORGmRgzTU3qIqpDj0zu5CBnSdZxb1tGdaQNa6hvcjnDTZHfG813z-h9r_aZ9nReUQvt0cbDwzpxBnWQ34_-zZXgh1Zzv4wdPc-S9SyUsUMoSMV6lGWaZN9lnc0bwcTMzt_Bow==&c=KI5f1VL5oG4bPgFiuCqDCvwbJCyZFE7kBQia3Y6GU52NMODlJUaHUg==&ch=9yNcy5tuXIpJP0vFfmStdByNu0a7M0TC-D6dLfruaFA50vBQNC32Hw==)
[Donate $25 to Take Back the House](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ypx9F-gq5DJCE4aGuQr6Z8BzYWEqq9XeQv07fCQhYWrABcI_kYrLlbB72npv8xY_CCA8D5W29-XvHr2UzQeUoG0NyhJz_uoLUhir0dWdoKlZVhQ8lkc0_K5yR_rRCWh8f4RMfooc0TqG--YFIV_Unr4_ihn-4nF08rlqgOxwMX8tVOgWaaBet73QNFUGqFBBzwXGapiE9LCSJoLdOu272i4VcG51GnCbWHDMD447YG-m9SfMhE5jaSYq82kRLyg0ZYUt627C-CGpObZkVozP6M38osiI4HWZenKawS8aXFzzQ8VC4ORGmRgzTU3qIqpDj0zu5CBnSdZxb1tGdaQNa6hvcjnDTZHfG813z-h9r_aZ9nReUQvt0cbDwzpxBnWQ34_-zZXgh1Zzv4wdPc-S9SyUsUMoSMV6lGWaZN9lnc0bwcTMzt_Bow==&c=KI5f1VL5oG4bPgFiuCqDCvwbJCyZFE7kBQia3Y6GU52NMODlJUaHUg==&ch=9yNcy5tuXIpJP0vFfmStdByNu0a7M0TC-D6dLfruaFA50vBQNC32Hw==)
The American people need Republican leaders who will fight for their businesses and livelihoods. Radical Democrats, like Speaker Pelosi, have made it clear they are more focused on their partisan agenda. ****

[Donate $25 to Take Back the House](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ypx9F-gq5DJCE4aGuQr6Z8BzYWEqq9XeQv07fCQhYWrABcI_kYrLlbB72npv8xY_CCA8D5W29-XvHr2UzQeUoG0NyhJz_uoLUhir0dWdoKlZVhQ8lkc0_K5yR_rRCWh8f4RMfooc0TqG--YFIV_Unr4_ihn-4nF08rlqgOxwMX8tVOgWaaBet73QNFUGqFBBzwXGapiE9LCSJoLdOu272i4VcG51GnCbWHDMD447YG-m9SfMhE5jaSYq82kRLyg0ZYUt627C-CGpObZkVozP6M38osiI4HWZenKawS8aXFzzQ8VC4ORGmRgzTU3qIqpDj0zu5CBnSdZxb1tGdaQNa6hvcjnDTZHfG813z-h9r_aZ9nReUQvt0cbDwzpxBnWQ34_-zZXgh1Zzv4wdPc-S9SyUsUMoSMV6lGWaZN9lnc0bwcTMzt_Bow==&c=KI5f1VL5oG4bPgFiuCqDCvwbJCyZFE7kBQia3Y6GU52NMODlJUaHUg==&ch=9yNcy5tuXIpJP0vFfmStdByNu0a7M0TC-D6dLfruaFA50vBQNC32Hw==)

Michelle Steel came to this country in search of opportunity. Instead, she witnesses her mother fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill, which she did not have the resources to fight back against. Michelle knew then and there she had to fight for her community and has since returned over $400 million to California taxpayers.

Michelle will fight for us in Washington. [**But right now, she 's counting on us to fight for her.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001L6dVgomnGJ9wgr8sS-2yrcwqVPwUh5G5goSUnVIIDTYtua_tFtsLoX0UD8Ks0La41qqcO8nD0JMuvwtfplRZddqTC82BJqadQvpUkohw_A1gT3-sBeyZuGwFjPbZajFaz1pGpqBQ4GutZRjWRF8elD7eCqTYbHbJyxJvS36fHVnpSjcTNYkYKuY7cnnITFrzigmyDDLYiq9o08uWftu3pYoYU88dEhB2F3ZoPcC4HhbqxLZEfYhnw1fm3K5Vr7v8jipsZQTcLq_mYWg-ygZI9RI2i8bf3SmrcbWCUjfBh0SNjuuZ_b-bx3TNJ-Rtwd9SvjdHEGNvZKtx5EMXsQ3so-2JxvCW6YofaRGT9g02xYVLSAvLxkQ-orwTlwhkAd74tnmiBnRwSqXLodLF8GWVSQ==&c=i7C8UgA4yH7eekzLXTQ0s7DuOB_UrQy019yZWI5vYj2tF-qdl_i07Q==&ch=fPDfPt5-w8H-AvsZ4iuJiSvxh4P-opWCf5ZZZKNhkzIaNBFz_GV8Kw==)

subject: Help us save oil and gas jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress

name: Tim Scott
subject: Friend, my thoughts on Impeachment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Parents grappling with closed schools, small businesses unable to keep the lights on, and vulnerable Americans scrambling to find vaccines. These are real challenges facing the American people. Instead of focusing on delivering results, the Democrat-controlled Senate is embarking on a frivolous impeachment trial.
Friend,

Day after day I hear about the struggles Americans face as we continue to combat the COVID-19 pandemic.

Parents grappling with closed schools, small businesses unable to keep the lights on, and vulnerable Americans scrambling to find vaccines.

_These are real challenges facing the American people._ Instead of focusing on delivering results, the Democrat-controlled Senate is embarking on a frivolous impeachment trial.

**It is shameful that in this time of crisis, Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are wasting time on impeachment proceedings.**

Friend, I hope you agree that there are more important issues we should be tackling instead of settling personal scores and wasting time on this political theater.

Let's get back to work on the real issues facing Americans. Let's reopen our schools, help our small businesses, and beat this pandemic.

[**I need your help. Will you stand with me, Friend?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/my-thoughts-on-impeachment/?utm_campaign=20210210_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1047704-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210210_first-name-my-thoughts-on-impeachmentH/)
[STAND WITH ME](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/my-thoughts-on-impeachment/?utm_campaign=20210210_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1047704-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210210_first-name-my-thoughts-on-impeachment/)
---

**A donation of $5 or $10 will go a long way toward sending a message to Senate Democrats that we will not stand for this frivolous impeachment.**

The American people demand leadership that will focus on the issues impacting their everyday lives. These are the issues I will continue to work on every single day.

As one of my most loyal supporters, I know you have been with me through thick and thin. [**I am counting on you to step up again to stand with me and I am grateful for anything you can do to help.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/my-thoughts-on-impeachment/?utm_campaign=20210210_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1047704-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210210_first-name-my-thoughts-on-impeachment/)

These radicals in the streets and in office will stop at nothing to DEFUND the brave men and women in uniform.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zam_9L_mJpvkMnd2HMqk36iASHCmVZNsNsMKMvUJw8NLyI1GgwKV87GV0iGq0qufANMK9L__Rx5WSEwvTKWJlZOZR6kod_gZVvW5uFzrwUBC_lp0xqpqcY0nHKOgBuEI67VvCErNnYM=&c=bZyl7rpxfvr_mjSp6XBa5AIGfGS3nsSLvGr9kjUmDIITAd7xoYtA3w==&ch=_bAPaVXsdvU5tQWbuawiFP98UfNaQCFRR62U5VQ368H7uUOwjsjH-A==).

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Unconstitutional impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uYjVSwL-JbJK42S08lQQGfyhgEmj6X9s2W6GqBoBu1ft4fOEojQdhfDEGSRL3JC1toxZH-2tHhTqdp8oabEuzCXzDKubyDxS3EbTprn6F5Q09NqnsJSDJw-D8JKPrFUpf30mMd_JCZpeCfU2ojFBysOb94r1_X5Q-xiShvSm34nr4FvaCQJ2aT_pZrzLyTnsZEyN3jDQgj22Jj7HVDPY2At5SEOSXvYjGHWrO1VjgJLPB2e26lJ5zrY4nRx4vkMExwC6aLI_ZK4CXJYLH60Z3hcvvpsZFz_iYA-uhdu4RdH213HlNwUF-w0IMfwdQTbfM-2r7iqVzUvHBg3oZlPA834IUmifgeeD18ZzRdVpYWQ3hEt_4ZrooSaVQYPwgL3kdzWRphQ76ZS1YRP4zUkYGA==&c=_fQuZDRM7FOuxjQdE49Zjq7XT1Ehr1QyH5SJOnvpKwZeEbYEEhkBRA==&ch=j6q9mYmTEPr_kElN6xc9Rm9DeSqPl2MAi7rpficahPDCmFi2KRcHPw==)
Friend -- Today, Democrats are forcing the U.S. Senate to begin an impeachment trial to remove a man from office who left office three weeks ago.

I wish I were joking. **Democrats are still obsessed with President Trump. And they 're putting their obsessions before the American people.

Let's call this what it is: unconstitutional.**

Our founders designed the impeachment process for one reason: to remove someone from office. They did not design it to be a partisan weapon to use against a private citizen.

I was the first U.S. Senator to call this unconstitutional. And now, I'm looking for 5,000 patriots who agree with me and will stand up to tell the truth.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Your Emails Worked - Mask Mandate Bill Laid Over
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_emails_worked_m&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **It looks like your calls and emails worked yesterday. Voting on the Mask Mandate Bill became incredibly toxic for the politicians. The Health Finance & Policy Committee [decided not to vote](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_mandate_bill_gets_laid_over?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_emails_worked_m&n=2) on it after a long, three hour committee hearing. ** Rep Jeremy Munson, who sits on the committee and is on our side on this issue, shared what his inbox looked like after our email blast went out two days ago. Unfortunately, Democrats won't give up on their efforts to control our lives and infringe on our liberties. The [bill was laid over](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_mandate_bill_gets_laid_over?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_emails_worked_m&n=3) for inclusion in a massive omnibus bill that will likely be voted on towards the end of the legislative session. If this bill becomes law, it would require you and me to wear a face covering anytime we are in a public building or business and it would fine us for noncompliance. Business owners who don't comply face up to 90 days of jail time. Of course, Governor Walz already decreed mask wearing last summer. This bill would just make what Walz already ordered, an actual law. Because, you know, Governors can't unilaterally create laws! We are seeing a rise in politicians who do not care about our Constitutional Republic. All they care about is controlling more of our lives.
## What We Are Doing About It
We rented a home in the district of one of our targeted legislators and hired a full time team of doorknockers and operators who will talk to every voter. We'll travel the district finding every supporter who shares our view to STOP the Mask Mandate Bill and End Walz' Emergency Powers for good. **Rep Julie Sandstede won her last election by only 30 votes. And I'm happy to report, we've already knocked on a couple hundred doors in her district in just the first two days.** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_emails_worked_m&n=4) And that wasn't easy - trust me. Temperatures are hovering around 20 below. But our team is not backing down. They're braving the weather to let Sandstede's voters know how she is voting. We will continue taking our message directly to voters in these vulnerable Democrats' districts. They either get on board, kill the Mask Mandate Bill and End Walz' Emergency Powers, or we'll make sure they don't get re-elected in 2022! **And we won't only be in one district. These Democrats better start voting to uphold our democratic process again, or we'll get our message in front of every single one of their voters as well.** Thank you for reaching out to legislators when we ask you - it makes a difference. And thank you for your [**support of our field operations**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_emails_worked_m&n=5). Let's put an End to Walz' Emergency Powers for good! **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_emails_worked_m&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_emails_worked_m&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=your_emails_worked_m&n=8), software for leaders.

I am deeply troubled by the crackdown of speech on these platforms. In recent months, we have seen _BIG TECH GIANTS_ :

_**☭ SHUTTING DOWN COMPETITORS ☭**_
_**☭ SILENCING NEWS OUTLETS ☭**_
_**☭ PREVENTING DISSENTING IDEAS ☭ **_
_**☭ ENCOURAGING MASS PUBLIC HARASSMENT ☭**_

These actions are more reminiscent of what the totalitarians do in **North Korea, Cuba,** or **China**. While these large tech companies have every right to remove people threatening violence and breaking their rules, it’s the culture of these platforms that is especially worrying.

Many people on these platforms call for speech codes, restricted speech, or ending the right to Freedom of Speech!

**Today, it’s de-platforming by Big Tech. Tomorrow, it’s censorship by government force!**

**I’ve fought for the Freedom of Speech my entire life.** I spent my career reporting on oppressive socialist and communist regimes in Latin America. I saw firsthand people in these countries had no protections to freely speak their minds and were often _**JAILED**_ for their speech!

That’s why the fight against Big Tech matters so much, because it’s the first one before the government starts clamping down on our First Amendment rights! **_[If you want to defend Freedom of Speech, then support my fight against BIG TECH right now!](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=0bd46c155a404e0f8fe042ea5b0f14f0&_e=y4QPNLvP-DxW7InauhkqSMPYLo3VnY9lrxOKcQ9XrZnKz3AEyjZnsD88ZsOeGTj0Dj-H8Cjz34e4pFHO5MviKq-xQdLE8oFBc-fcBkXpmRMy6EDd4bAjNYC4c_Mjwmnup79gtbyAvx-rHPAgbxagUm1HMBwaA_NmmOkZ0tTPe2oNwzLw9_YpsNZxTb8OJe0InGIWGnmrf3akFNhdaOeDybixEUKwxpQZ6r29FXKrAdrjHOYzzCfEvX0Do1HABbhonKiddjBKR0TxKDXsuMYZWdNyGeY39b7nYNz6jnUqgQnHuYUybT3D7Gg3zIuT-_rwzRISjh9S7nVMZLCstAXMzYzd_HIK4b6DiMWN_MoWDdkFYHpQ54X_WBKePzHdAx3U_FR4C2tY-OU9Wrim_aCrgDG2zmvLmVu_HoRdRlKxCIjHy6OdJEePbYUbYAnNMQujP-w7C59842b42yq9-bdbp6LUh0seZZLOD7Mu-1G0dNw%3D)_**

clean_body: Have you seen this video? I am deeply troubled by the crackdown of speech on these platforms. In recent months, we have seen BIG TECH GIANTS... | | Peter, Did you see my response to the recent crackdown by Big Tech companies? | | I am deeply troubled by the crackdown of speech on these platforms. In recent months, we have seen BIG TECH GIANTS : ☭ SHUTTING DOWN COMPETITORS ☭ ☭ SILENCING NEWS OUTLETS ☭ ☭ PREVENTING DISSENTING IDEAS ☭ ☭ ENCOURAGING MASS PUBLIC HARASSMENT ☭ These actions are more reminiscent of what the totalitarians do in North Korea, Cuba, or China. While these large tech companies have every right to remove people threatening violence and breaking their rules, it’s the culture of these platforms that is especially worrying. Many people on these platforms call for speech codes, restricted speech, or ending the right to Freedom of Speech! Today, it’s de-platforming by Big Tech. Tomorrow, it’s censorship by government force! I’ve fought for the Freedom of Speech my entire life. I spent my career reporting on oppressive socialist and communist regimes in Latin America. I saw firsthand people in these countries had no protections to freely speak their minds and were often JAILED for their speech! That’s why the fight against Big Tech matters so much, because it’s the first one before the government starts clamping down on our First Amendment rights! A time is coming where we must defend our right to the freedom of speech, and when that time comes, we can’t afford to stay silent! I promise to always fight for our First Amendment rights, and I will never bow to Big Tech’s censorship! Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Vaccine Q&A
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Rhode Island has already administered nearly 130,000 doses of the COVID-19 vaccine, but there's still a long way to go. This is a challenge unlike any other we have faced, and we're putting in place the systems and processes to get it done safely, quickly, and with a focus on equity. I'm grateful for the hard work of the Department of Health, National Guard, and so many others in making this a reality.
I had the opportunity yesterday to visit the state-run vaccination site in Cranston and to see firsthand the thorough and efficient operation set up by the National Guard.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KRO-2nF4pDSQMleynqMdMeymqEInhfdM5Ep3DtUFleY6fFK7hpl_ea89kz_lS14OZnjU2DNDHcBn1NN69BoNUJNajz8viAs7o4Y0ZD-X4UQP-za0ivKcyHJc_85eSSws8xM3LYqvUbg=&c=k099dpd-FjOqpHMFfh59EaSgGv1wnxd9n3wMh8n6S9lSI--ajUBTOg==&ch=eFFDYVf6GSNYnrBSjPKibZ-wkmuzqDn-FCQvcMst4kLDx4g8sMjuQw==)
---
| I also joined Lieutenant Governor Dan McKee for a Facebook Live event yesterday to address some of the most common questions we've received about the vaccine. We asked Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott and Dr. Jim McDonald of the Department of Health your questions and got some great answers. We touched on where and when you can get vaccinated, some of the myths around the vaccine, and more. You can watch that discussion by clicking [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KRO-2nF4pDSQMleynqMdMeymqEInhfdM5Ep3DtUFleY6fFK7hpl_ecDnO9ZHk9u7GbjgcGCRCN8ZOzlsIwahX4qQuWJAAIoutKupHw5fqitn0wYt1sYbbCxrJOnBb-GJi5sd5_1l94QNZqWSOSW5Nv-tvbJm1w-wrOiaU76kf1laU5LH5Oa0WWu2B3qEM5UEUWGi9914KKqMZfpS8VhZytwmzN0_s41xzjHgXuR_aD8JSn4XktKKcTx8S_Ytc-nb&c=k099dpd-FjOqpHMFfh59EaSgGv1wnxd9n3wMh8n6S9lSI--ajUBTOg==&ch=eFFDYVf6GSNYnrBSjPKibZ-wkmuzqDn-FCQvcMst4kLDx4g8sMjuQw==) or on the picture below.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KRO-2nF4pDSQMleynqMdMeymqEInhfdM5Ep3DtUFleY6fFK7hpl_ecDnO9ZHk9u7GbjgcGCRCN8ZOzlsIwahX4qQuWJAAIoutKupHw5fqitn0wYt1sYbbCxrJOnBb-GJi5sd5_1l94QNZqWSOSW5Nv-tvbJm1w-wrOiaU76kf1laU5LH5Oa0WWu2B3qEM5UEUWGi9914KKqMZfpS8VhZytwmzN0_s41xzjHgXuR_aD8JSn4XktKKcTx8S_Ytc-nb&c=k099dpd-FjOqpHMFfh59EaSgGv1wnxd9n3wMh8n6S9lSI--ajUBTOg==&ch=eFFDYVf6GSNYnrBSjPKibZ-wkmuzqDn-FCQvcMst4kLDx4g8sMjuQw==)
---
| We're continuously working to improve our vaccine operation and keep you and your family safe. Our numbers are trending in the right direction. Let's stay vigilant, wear our masks, get tested often, and do everything we can to protect our households as we work to put COVID-19 behind us.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
|
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903

name: Kevin Hern
subject: We need TERM LIMITS in Congress!
disclaimer_text: paid for by the special interests, and they’ve forgotten who they work for
body:
Far too many of these folks have forgotten who they work for. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8885429d7288a931/684ac6d3a1e4a67ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, I’ve been concerned about this for years, like millions of other Americans. But it wasn’t until I came to Washington myself – to represent the good people of Oklahoma’s First District in the U.S. House – that I saw for myself the lengths politicians will go to in order to hold onto power. Today, we have FAR too many career politicians in Washington who ARE NOT working in the best interests of our country and the American people. Desperate to stay in office for decades on end rather than get a job in the real world, they say and do anything to pander to voters and their backers. They are bought and paid for by the special interests, and they’ve forgotten who they work for. Peter, I’m leading the charge to get Congress on the road to real reform and restore public trust in our government. **[I hope to have you standing with me](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8885429d7288a931/81caf12a6b76672ac3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. I’ve filed a series of bills now to shake up how our federal government is run, with term limits at the top of my priority list. We must end this prolonged era of “career” politicians running our country once and for all. It’s time to put citizens back in charge – people from diverse backgrounds and all walks of life and professions, who run to serve their home communities and our nation. Today, the “game” is to occupy a seat for years or even decades, amass personal power, and then climb the ladder to high-paid lobbying jobs and cushy seats on corporate boards. Our Founding Fathers couldn’t have even imagined what we see today. **[Sign up here to learn more about my push for term limits and fundamental reform>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8885429d7288a931/3fd52d7b63df2c2bc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** As always, I’m grateful for the activism and support of dedicated conservatives like you. THANK YOU for being part of Team Hern! \- Kevin [**DONATE HERE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8885429d7288a931/a96b6f8730ca3e78c3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-12-15-16:46:59:066t Paid For By Hern For Congress
---

clean_body: Far too many of these folks have forgotten who they work for. Read more >> Dear Peter, I’ve been concerned about this for years, like millions of other Americans. But it wasn’t until I came to Washington myself – to represent the good people of Oklahoma’s First District in the U.S. House – that I saw for myself the lengths politicians will go to in order to hold onto power. Today, we have FAR too many career politicians in Washington who ARE NOT working in the best interests of our country and the American people. Desperate to stay in office for decades on end rather than get a job in the real world, they say and do anything to pander to voters and their backers. They are bought and paid for by the special interests, and they’ve forgotten who they work for. Peter, I’m leading the charge to get Congress on the road to real reform and restore public trust in our government. . I’ve filed a series of bills now to shake up how our federal government is run, with term limits at the top of my priority list. We must end this prolonged era of “career” politicians running our country once and for all. It’s time to put citizens back in charge – people from diverse backgrounds and all walks of life and professions, who run to serve their home communities and our nation. Today, the “game” is to occupy a seat for years or even decades, amass personal power, and then climb the ladder to high-paid lobbying jobs and cushy seats on corporate boards. Our Founding Fathers couldn’t have even imagined what we see today. As always, I’m grateful for the activism and support of dedicated conservatives like you. THANK YOU for being part of Team Hern! \- Kevin id:2020-12-15-16:46:59:066t Paid For By Hern For Congress

clean_body: Support Ashley in opposing them! &zwnj == == Friend, Liberal states like California and New York that have mismanaged their budgets should not be rewarded with $350 billion of our taxpayer dollars \-- that is why Ashley Hinson opposes President Biden 's Blue State Bailout! Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer want taxpayers from across America to bear the burden for their home states. When Ashley was in the Iowa State Legislature, she and her colleagues put in the time and effort to properly manage Iowa's budget. Why, then, should these Democrat-run states across the country be able to get away with their fiscal mismanagement? == == Ashley went to Washington to bring some Iowa Common Sense back to Congress, but it makes absolutely no sense for Iowa taxpayers to be bailing out New York and California. Instead of these massive and unjustified bailouts, Ashley is fighting for targeted relief to go to our small business owners and working families who have suffered from the COVID-19 pandemic. == == == == == Thank you, Team Hinson Campaign HQ | Follow and Share us with your network! | ==| ==| == ---|---|--- == PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24884695/272102354/-1839819742?refcode=bsp_em_fr_x_logo_ux_xx&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmQ3MWZmOS1mNzZiLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VF9b0WMs_56rRv7sSkoeH5FxP_CfcfvxqtEY-6qP8DY=)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24884696/272102355/1312640489?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210210_FR_BIO2_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmQ3MWZmOS1mNzZiLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VF9b0WMs_56rRv7sSkoeH5FxP_CfcfvxqtEY-6qP8DY=) After a tough re-election in a battleground district, I’m honored to be representing Nevada’s third district once again and serve my second term in the House of Representatives. I’m about to **[ask for you to chip in $5 to help keep Nevada blue and continue building the movement that demands progress for our state,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24884697/272102356/1312640489?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210210_FR_BIO2_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmQ3MWZmOS1mNzZiLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VF9b0WMs_56rRv7sSkoeH5FxP_CfcfvxqtEY-6qP8DY=)** but first I want to tell you why this work is so important to me. I was born in Canton, Ohio. My father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant and my mother had her hands full raising myself and my seven siblings. _You read that right -- there were 8 of us._ I started working a paper route at the age of eight, and I fondly remember going to swim practice after school everyday because it was the one sport where my mom could drop all of us off at once. I graduated from a public high school and worked my way through college, at times working three and four jobs. I’ll be honest: Growing up in a working family in the middle of Ohio wasn’t dazzling, **but it taught me a lot about how a hard-working family can succeed when we have institutions that uplift everyone -- not just those at the top.** When I moved to Las Vegas as an adult, I knew I wanted to work to improve public education and create more opportunities for children to become involved in sports. I know firsthand how instrumental education and after-school programming are in setting children up for success -- and I made it my mission to make that opportunity more equitable. But after decades of working in the nonprofit sector, I saw how critical public policy is to every level of success for the families and children I was working with. Washington was failing to take action on the issues these folks needed addressed most _\-- and they needed it to happen yesterday._ They need stronger, more equitable public education where your zip code didn’t determine the quality of your school or how much your teachers were paid. They need a livable wage and workers’ rights that allow them to work in a safe environment. They need access to quality health care that won’t force them to choose between going to see a doctor and buying groceries. **So I ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada to fight for hardworking families and with the help of this team, we won.** I’m fighting each and every day to improve the quality of our public education, protect our environment against climate change, and make health care an accessible reality for ALL Americans. And now that Democrats have control of the House, the Senate, AND the White House in 2021, we’re pushing that much further to achieve progress. **Here’s where I need your help:** In order to continue this fight, I need to win re-election in Nevada’s most competitive Congressional district. Nevada was a battleground state for the presidential election, and _Trump campaigned to flip my district the most because he knows he can --**he won it in 2016.**_ National Republicans spent more than $3.5 million attacking me in 2020, and while they weren’t successful in taking back this district -- they closed the margin of victory by SIX POINTS and made NV-03 one of the closest toss-up seats in the nation. That’s why I’m asking for your help -- early money is critical in an incumbent campaign in order to fend off interest from the NRCC and super PACs. [**I want to continue fighting for Nevada families -- who have worked hard but Washington hasn’t worked nearly hard enough for them. So what do you say? Will you chip in $5 to help me defend this battleground district and support a fight that believes EVERYONE deserves a chance?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24884698/272102357/1312640489?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210210_FR_BIO2_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmQ3MWZmOS1mNzZiLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VF9b0WMs_56rRv7sSkoeH5FxP_CfcfvxqtEY-6qP8DY=) | | | [Chip in $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24884699/272102358/1312640489?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210210_FR_BIO2_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmQ3MWZmOS1mNzZiLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VF9b0WMs_56rRv7sSkoeH5FxP_CfcfvxqtEY-6qP8DY=)

clean_body: | = | | = After a tough re-election in a battleground district, I’m honored to be representing Nevada’s third district once again and serve my second term in the House of Representatives. I’m about to = but first I want to tell you why this work is so important to me. I was born in Canton, Ohio. My father was a military veteran who worked at a steel plant and my mother had her hands full raising myself and my seven siblings. You read that right -- there were 8 of us. I started working a paper route at the age of eight, and I fondly remember going to swim practice after school everyday because it was the one sport where my mom could drop all of us off at once. I graduated from a public high school and worked my way through college, at times working three and four jobs. I’ll be honest: Growing up in a working family in the middle of Ohio wasn’t dazzling, but it taught me a lot about how a hard-working family can succeed when we have institutions that uplift everyone -- not just those at the top. When I moved to Las Vegas as an adult, I knew I wanted to work to improve public education and create more opportunities for children to become involved in sports. I know firsthand how instrumental education and after-school programming are in setting children up for success -- and I made it my mission to make that opportunity more equitable. But after decades of working in the nonprofit sector, I saw how critical public policy is to every level of success for the families and children I was working with. Washington was failing to take action on the issues these folks needed addressed most \-- and they needed it to happen yesterday. They need stronger, more equitable public education where your zip code didn’t determine the quality of your school or how much your teachers were paid. They need a livable wage and workers’ rights that allow them to work in a safe environment. They need access to quality health care that won’t force them to choose between going to see a doctor and buying groceries. So I ran for Congress in the most competitive district in Nevada to fight for hardworking families and with the help of this team, we won. I’m fighting each and every day to improve the quality of our public education, protect our environment against climate change, and make health care an accessible reality for ALL Americans. And now that Democrats have control of the House, the Senate, AND the White House in 2021, we’re pushing that much further to achieve progress. Here’s where I need your help: In order to continue this fight, I need to win re-election in Nevada’s most competitive Congressional district. Nevada was a battleground state for the presidential election, and Trump campaigned to flip my district the most because he knows he can --he won it in 2016. National Republicans spent more than $3.5 million attacking me in 2020, and while they weren’t successful in taking back this district -- they closed the margin of victory by SIX POINTS and made NV-03 one of the closest toss-up seats in the nation. That’s why I’m asking for your help -- early money is critical in an incumbent campaign in order to fend off interest from the NRCC and super PACs. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for believing in us, Susie | | If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

body:
Friend, did you see the opening statements of President Trump's impeachment hearings yesterday?

This trial is stupid, counterproductive, and a joke. Our country needs healing, and the Democrats are more interested in wasting our time playing political games, further dividing our country, than working to provide help to struggling Americans. This impeachment trial is throwing gasoline onto a fire, and it needs to end immediately.

name: Sam Ricketts, Evergreen Action
subject: The most exciting aspect of Biden's climate plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We can do this with or without Republican support.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=3&akid=6616%2E53494%2E6U7fbt) Friend, Among the most exciting—and, dare we say, energizing—aspects of Joe Biden's climate plans is the 2035 clean electricity standard, or CES. If passed by Congress, it would mean transforming the U.S. power grid to run entirely on clean, carbon-free electricity by 2035. The American people broadly support it, and we have the technology to make it happen. Now, we just need the political will, which is why we teamed up with our friends at Data for Progress to write a new paper that provides a roadmap for legislating a clean electricity standard into reality. **[Check out our one-minute hype video right now to get the gist. (And if you want to read the full paper, watch to the end to get the link!)](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2083?t=4&akid=6616%2E53494%2E6U7fbt)** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2083?t=5&akid=6616%2E53494%2E6U7fbt) Recent history tells us that Republicans in the House and Senate will try to obstruct Democratic legislative goals, no matter the cost to the country or the planet. Our paper outlines several ways that CES legislation can make its way through the House and Senate _with or without Republican support_ —and urges the Biden-Harris administration and the Democratic majorities in Congress to press ahead. "This transition will happen," said Senator Tina Smith, who teamed up with us for the paper's rollout. "We can either choose to lead through this clean energy transition, or we can follow. And if we lead, we can grab on to the incredible opportunities that a clean energy transition can create for us." **[Our CES paper is going to be a crucial tool for pushing our agenda forward. I hope you'll take one minute to watch the video and get *ahem* energized for this next phase.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2083?t=6&akid=6616%2E53494%2E6U7fbt)** Thanks, Sam Ricketts
Co-Founder, Evergreen Action | [WATCH NOW ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2083?t=7&akid=6616%2E53494%2E6U7fbt)
---

---

| | | Nancy Pelosi, Rita Hart and the liberal House Administration Committee are going to try to steal this election from the voters of Iowa by any means necessary. We can not let them. We need your help to stop this radical power grab.

We have prepared a list of action items for you to help us in our fight to maintain Iowa's election integrity:

Peter,
Moms in Office is committed to working to make sure our government is representative and works for all families. Part of what we do is uplift other groups working towards the same goals.
The Collective PAC is working to to end the under-representation of Black voices in our politics. We stand with them in that endeavor.
[**Join us and stand up for political equity**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/24887259/272125023/1872491848?refcode=0210&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZkMjcxOGFhLTA1NmMtZWIxMS05ODg5LTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ludQHzsuR-EWZMiLYr9i6spWKPkCmUpeAwYLRZ2pyAI=)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Tammy Duckworth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I am proud to support my friend Tammy Duckworth for re-election -- and I am asking this grassroots team to stand together once again to keep Illinois blue and protect our majority.
#
Peter,
In 2020, this team helped keep Illinois blue -- and take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell.
In the next elections, the path to defending our majority once again runs through Illinois. My friend and colleague Tammy Duckworth is on the ballot -- and she needs our early support to build a winning campaign and keep this crucial seat in Democratic hands in 2022 and beyond.
**[Will you contribute $5 now to re-elect my fellow Illinois Senator Tammy Duckworth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24887481/272127367/2138899390?refcode=em210209i&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWQ3N2M5Ni0wNzZjLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgdMbG0CW1j-YAjK29E_Az2RT_EYa5O-9i5dlHBzvWY=)**

I am proud to support my friend Tammy Duckworth for re-election -- and I am asking this grassroots team to stand together once again to keep Illinois blue and protect our majority.
**[Rush in a $5 contribution now to send Tammy Duckworth back to the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/24887482/272127368/2138899390?refcode=em210209i&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWQ3N2M5Ni0wNzZjLWViMTEtOTg4OS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rgdMbG0CW1j-YAjK29E_Az2RT_EYa5O-9i5dlHBzvWY=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

Peter,
A left-wing progressive group called “U Against Hawley PAC” is raising money to silence and intimidate me and my team and _**YOUR VOICE!**_

_**The most disturbing thing about this group is that they are located in Boston, Massachusetts.**_ It’s nothing but an East Coast elitist group that thinks it speaks for the hardworking people of Missouri and our values.

_**We cannot allow liberal elites from Massachusetts to take our voice from us!**_

My team needs your patriotic support to fight back. **I hope you will donate $10 and join me today in standing up for Missouri.**

clean_body: A left-wing progressive group called "U Against Hawley PAC" is raising money to silence and intimidate me and my team and YOUR VOICE! | | | Peter, A left-wing progressive group called “U Against Hawley PAC” is raising money to silence and intimidate me and my team and YOUR VOICE! The most disturbing thing about this group is that they are located in Boston, Massachusetts. It’s nothing but an East Coast elitist group that thinks it speaks for the hardworking people of Missouri and our values. We cannot allow liberal elites from Massachusetts to take our voice from us! My team needs your patriotic support to fight back. I hope you will donate $10 and join me today in standing up for Missouri. While it’s not terribly shocking that another coastal, liberal organization looks down at Midwesterners like we are just a bunch of deplorables, we must ensure they do not defeat us with their messaging games and online super PACs. So please, join me and my team, and stand up for your voice before it’s too late. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

Peter,

_I know you’re seeing what’s happening to America’s small businesses right now._ We’ve lost over **100,000** small businesses and the businesses that are left are fighting desperately just to stay open!

I come from generations of small business owners. **My parents’ business is literally on Main Street! **

And Peter, let me tell you — it makes me furious to see how Democrat lockdowns have decimated the people that are the backbone of our country.

I’m already fighting every day in Congress on the Small Business Committee to help defend our remaining small businesses, but I want to do more! That's why I’m putting together the _**MAIN STREET DEFENSE TEAM**_ , which will be made up of Americans who are tired of seeing the forced shutdowns of businesses in their communities!

**The Goal ➡️ Defend Small Businesses anyway we can! **
** **
**➡ _Fundraise_ for struggling small businesses!**
**➡ _Highlight_ draconian measures and fines on social media! **
**➡ _Hold_ Democrat politicians accountable for their hypocrisy! **

clean_body: I know you’re one of those Americans who wants to join the fight for small businesses. Become a member of my MAIN STREET DEFENSE TEAM today... | | Peter, I know you’re seeing what’s happening to America’s small businesses right now. We’ve lost over 100,000 small businesses and the businesses that are left are fighting desperately just to stay open! I come from generations of small business owners. My parents’ business is literally on Main Street! And Peter, let me tell you — it makes me furious to see how Democrat lockdowns have decimated the people that are the backbone of our country. I’m already fighting every day in Congress on the Small Business Committee to help defend our remaining small businesses, but I want to do more! That's why I’m putting together the MAIN STREET DEFENSE TEAM , which will be made up of Americans who are tired of seeing the forced shutdowns of businesses in their communities! The Goal ➡️ Defend Small Businesses anyway we can! ➡ Fundraise for struggling small businesses! ➡ Highlight draconian measures and fines on social media! ➡ Hold Democrat politicians accountable for their hypocrisy! Peter, I’m reaching out to you directly, and because I know you’re one of those Americans who wants to join the fight for small businesses! | - | Main Street Defense Team Email: Main Street Defense Team:MEMBERSHIP PENDING... | Peter, we are going to rebuild our communities and get our country thriving again, but it’s going to take all of us to defend our small businesses first!
